name: Sherrod Brown
subject: we must do better for American families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | I brought a very special guest with me to the State of the Union in January -- Rita Lewis.

Rita's husband, Butch, was a truck driver and Purple Heart recipient -- he worked hard, served his country, paid into his pension, and retired. One year after retiring, he was notified that his multi-employer pension benefits would be cut by 40 percent.

Rather than enjoy the retirement he spent his life working for, he spent his days worrying about paying the bills and providing for his family.

The last conversation he ever had with Rita before his passing was about the pension crisis affecting so many Ohioans like them. Since then, Rita's been working alongside thousands of workers and retirees in Ohio whose pensions are in jeopardy to sound the alarm.

**If Congress doesn 't act soon, some two hundred multi-employer pension plans could go bankrupt** \-- jeopardizing the livelihoods of nearly 1,500,000 workers and retirees.

[_**I 'm demanding Congress take action to address the pension crisis. Join me by signing your name >>**_](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffa96/4462dc26/5e66945d/2007fdec/365329680/VEsH/ "http://www.act-on-pension-crisis.com/#brown")

These workers aren't asking for a miracle or for a handout. They're asking us to fulfill the simple promise that's been made to them.

These folks worked hard. They played by all the rules and paid into their pension with every paycheck. Over a lifetime of work, they've earned a secure retirement.

I invited Rita to be my guest because we need to shine a light on this crisis. No family should have to go through what Rita and Butch went through -- No family should feel like their voices aren't being heard and their suffering is falling on deaf ears.

But if Congress continues down this path, **I cannot and will not allow that to happen.**

[_**Join me in urging Congress to take action on the pension crisis before major pension plans go bankrupt.**_](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffa96/4462dc26/5e66945d/2007fdec/365329680/VEsE/ "http://www.act-on-pension-crisis.com/#brown") | | | [SIGN YOUR NAME >>](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffa96/4462dc26/5e66945d/2007fdec/365329680/VEsF/ "http://www.act-on-pension-crisis.com/#brown")
---
With gratitude,

Sherrod

name: The White House
subject: President Trump supports prison reform
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d8c2b28cdecb52702903847080f559fdca11c0bd0caa86986478c6c795d585f5df2d196f54b53a314419f82d3c2a60202f06be922c00de54) The White House • May 21, 2018
## The Day Ahead
| • | President Donald J. Trump is participating in the swearing-in ceremony for America's new Director of the Central Intelligence Agency, Gina Haspel.
---|---
• | The President will host dinner for a group of governors to discuss the importance of secure borders, smart immigration policies, and safe communities.
## President Trump supports prison reform
**Crime imposes a significant burden on Americans' well-being** and taxpayer-financed resources. These costs are amplified by re-arrest rates for released American prisoners that exceed 50 percent. Many programs have been tried to reverse this trend over the past few decades. Some of them work; some don't.
**President Donald J. Trump supports prison reform legislation** that builds on evidence-based programs to reduce prisoner recidivism rates. The President has called on Congress to help former inmates who have completed their sentences to have a second chance to become contributing members of society.
**The White House hosted a summit on prisons last week**. "Prison reform is an issue that unites people from across the political spectrum," President Trump said. "It's an amazing thing. Our whole nation benefits if former inmates are able to reenter society as productive, law-abiding citizens."
[Learn how President Trump wants to fix America's prison system.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d8c2b28cdecb527083ff1d9f8c067997ac45c1ac8dd2e6ec85e5cd20c8d5bd892b5840bf13b5e3ac316a0eeba95982a2ba40e21c0d0797a4)
**Watch** : [Highlights from the President's remarks at the White House summit](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d8c2b28cdecb52702e8e46d9dd1408c107e501a956eed4c718ac67ddf19e00a8dd5901d97d497cefea7fe90940e13c60c5acd84e032df8aa)

---
|

## Making NATO work for America-and the world
**President Trump hosted NATO Secretary General Jens Stoltenberg** at the White House last week. The President is continuing the legacy of transatlantic unity and is working with Secretary General Stoltenberg to ensure a successful NATO Summit this summer. President Trump also met with United Nations Secretary-General Antonio Guterres on Friday.
**Sharing the defense burden continues to be a major priority.** The Trump Administration is working with NATO Allies to ensure they make progress in meeting their agreed-upon defense spending commitments, which is in the interest of each NATO member individually and the alliance collectively.
**Every NATO member has increased defense** spending since President Trump took office. In 2017 alone, there was a boost of more than 4.8 percent in defense spending among NATO Allies, amounting to nearly $14 billion. This was the largest single-year increase in more than a quarter century.
[More from President Trump's meeting with NATO's Secretary General](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d8c2b28cdecb5270ac2f3b625e779a435b72cc895d9991aab767fae4566f5736fd3d9aabc009d5351326282acd5581ffaffcdee64b822e34)
**Watch** : [The President participates in an expanded bilateral with the Secretary General ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d8c2b28cdecb52701a9ee501c5cf241e7648e42d3ff064548de931d4fb61423f922da7d7d67a639cb62bd83b07bedf97d7a850c8768c1738)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
**President Trump delivers remarks at the White House Prison Reform Summit** | May 18, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d8c2b28cdecb5270ecba871d0f418ad599ef4fe42f58f350432b0e9b23831fdbaba3b0376ea8bba127357e3c36afada9e6866debd85bfd57) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d8c2b28cdecb5270faadddef90a380f329cd611eb646584a596b7b045853517b74f30a78f66f4b498cff1eb1ed863fbcc98f8776897adc11) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4171f77a38215abfc037b276bed84fb321f58fb1fc86d52cda70f085f9a65c32f81d5cf736760f988205784928755519f5aa025fa5656be77)

subject: 100,000 signatures needed: Legalize marijuana
body:
Dear Activist,

The fact is, marijuana laws have not been applied and enforced in the same way for all people in this country.

**African-Americans use marijuana at roughly the same rate as white-Americans but are approximately four times more likely to be arrested for possession.**

That's not right -- and it's why Kamala is co-sponsoring legislation with Cory Booker to legalize marijuana nationwide and expunge the records of people who have prior marijuana convictions related to use or possession.

[**Sign Kamala 's petition right now if you agree: it's time to legalize marijuana nationwide because it's the right and smart thing to do.**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/d2nWc/6/tl/r5cs/61pVYV/s1mQe7An0m/P/P) ****[Sign the petition](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/d2nWc/s/tl/r5cs/61pVYV/z7J1po8Fr0/P/P)**** The marijuana laws we currently have at the local and federal level are simply not fair in application or enforcement. All we're doing is ruining the lives of people across America by contributing to our mass incarceration crisis, which wastes billions in taxpayer dollars every year.

**Every day we continue to enforce our failed marijuana laws is a day we 're repeating the mistakes of the past.**

It's alarming that the Trump Administration continues to target those who use marijuana instead of going after drug cartels, violent crime, or major traffickers -- that's not smart or tough on crime.

**Now is the time to learn from the failed War on Drugs and legalize marijuana while providing restorative justice to the millions of people who had their lives destroyed because of our regressive policies.**

[**Add your name to Kamala 's petition if you agree that right now is the time to legalize marijuana. We need your voice in this fight.**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/d2nWc/v/tl/r5cs/61pVYV/syZtkTk4mg/P/P) ****[Sign the petition](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/d2nWc/z/tl/r5cs/61pVYV/vSyUyOdzST/P/P)**** We can't go backward. Now is the time we must fight to defend and expand on the progress made for women's rights and reproductive health.

Thanks for making your voice heard,

Team Kamala
****[Sign the petition](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/d2nWc/U/tl/r5cs/61pVYV/SIMEfvZQO/P/P)****

Fellow Democrat,
Our Legislators are back in town today and tomorrow for the special session called by the governor. Democrats are in town standing up for their fellow West Virginians while Republicans are continuing to fight for themselves and their special interest buddies.
We launched our**Fight for 55** campaign for one reason, **to fight for all 55 counties of West Virginia**. We cannot move West Virginia forward unless we're helping all West Virginians. [Can we count on you to pitch in $5 to support our Legislators who stand up for us and not the top 1%?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1251984/6893560/-1315516360?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTBmZGQzMy0wZDVkLWU4MTEtODBjMy0wMDE1NWRhNzgwMTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=33AulYvscy0cV-eusvnsW3ye-mnKVi2Rnfba76So3_k=)

The Republican leadership is in chaos like we've never seen before and that's hurting West Virginia families.
[**We have to keep going. Sincerely,
_WVDP Fight for 55 _

| | Thank you to everyone who has supported me and extended well wishes these past few days. The election results are disappointing, of course, but the loss does not change my deep love for Pennsylvania and its people. It has been and continues to be, a tremendous honor to serve as your Lieutenant Governor. Changes in the commonwealth are exciting and promising. Hardworking, bright, and motivated leaders are emerging to ensure Pennsylvania's wellbeing. I am inspired by the movement to change the climate of partisan and unfair politics. In the coming months, I will focus on my job and do what I've done every day since taking office: work for criminal justice reform, support veterans, and fight for equal rights. Tonya and I are with you, and ever so grateful that you were with us. Thank you, _Mike_ |

clean_body: | "" | | Thank you to everyone who has supported me and extended well wishes these past few days. The election results are disappointing, of course, but the loss does not change my deep love for Pennsylvania and its people. name: Jeffrey Carson, AustinPetersen.com
subject: Campaign Update: Media coverage, events, ads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Hi Friend, Before I get into the campaign update, I’d like to give you a quick heads up. Austin is planning on sending you an important email tomorrow. Please be sure you check your inbox in the morning! Here is the campaign update for the past week! Thank you for your continued support of the campaign. We couldn’t do this without your help. **The Blaze Covers Chicken Ad:** This one cracked me up. The headline is, “[**An AG, a bomber pilot, and a freedom fighter...with a chicken: Choices in the MO GOP Senate primary**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.theblaze.com%2Fnews%2F2018%2F05%2F18%2Fan-ag-a-bomber-pilot-and-a-freedom-fighter-with-a-chicken-choices-in-the-mo-gop-senate-primary%23comments&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=052118_update&n=1)”. First, I’d like to thank The Blaze for recognizing that Austin is the freedom fighter in the race! Secondly, I’d like to point out how much negative press Hawley receives in this article. More and more voters and members of the media are catching on to how poorly prepared Josh Hawley is to fight Claire McCaskill. Check out what Gary Nolan said about the race, “I’ll take Hawley every day over Claire McCaskill. But I’ll take Petersen in a New York second over Hawley.” Hawley’s support continues to deteriorate. Politico even wrote a scathing piece about how GOP donors, voters, the media, and conservative activists are upset with Hawley’s campaign. [**You can read that here.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.politico.com%2Fstory%2F2018%2F05%2F15%2Fhawley-mccaskill-missouri-senate-585892&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=052118_update&n=2) If you haven’t seen our ad where we calling out Josh Hawley for refusing to debate Austin, [**you can watch it here >>>**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/chicken_ad?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=052118_update&n=3) **Campaign stops:** Last week we spent time in southern Missouri meeting with primary voters and local GOP organizations. As you know, Austin’s campaign actually meets and interacts with voters... Unlike some campaigns. We stopped by the Pike County Lincoln Days, and the Pemiscot County GOP Committee Meeting. Austin also had the pleasure of being introduced to the Missouri state legislature by Rep. Paul Curtman.
**Media coverage:** Besides the big article from the Blaze last week, Austin received a few other media hits. You can check out his interview with Marc Cox regarding the campaign and the newly appointed CIA director [**here**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2F971talk.radio.com%2Fblogs%2Fmarc-cox-morning-show%2Faustin-petersen-us-senate-race&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=052118_update&n=4). You can also check out Austin's appearance on the Gary Nolan show by clicking [**here**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.spreaker.com%2Fuser%2F9909798%2F9am-5-16%3Futm_medium%3Dwidget%26utm_source%3Duser%253A9909798%26utm_term%3Depisode_title&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=052118_update&n=5). Thank you so much, Friend! Jeffrey Carson
Campaign Manager
Austin Petersen for U.S. Senate

---

([www.austinpetersen.com](http://www.austinpetersen.com/?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=052118_update&n=6))

name: Christina Reynolds, EMILY's List
subject: This is how badly Republicans want to keep the House >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5b15/24c69fd9/1bc07f195/188efed5/3225591/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEQ46N_digital_email_20180521_Adelson_inact&source=WQEFEQ46N_digital_email_20180521_Adelson_inact")
---

Peter,

House Republicans are calling in backup.

Democrats have a real chance to flip the House in November, so Paul Ryan flew across the country to ask Sheldon Adelson -- a multi-billionaire casino mogul -- for an emergency donation to a Republican super PAC to help hold on to their majority.

And Adelson cut a check for a whopping _$30 million_.

Our candidates don't have the GOP's multi-billionaire donors. They have something even better -- us: a huge community of passionate people who tirelessly work to help elect and re-elect pro-choice Democratic women.

**[Donate $3 to make sure our pro-choice Democratic women can fight back against billionaire Republican donors like Adelson and flip the House.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5b15/24c69fd9/1bc07f195/188efed6/3225591/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180521_email_Adelson?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+make+sure+our+prochoice+Demo&utm_campaign=WQEFEQ46N_digital_email_20180521_Adelson_inact&source=WQEFEQ46N_digital_email_20180521_Adelson_inact")**

Adelson's $30 million donation is three times more than what he gave to the same super PAC in the 2016 cycle. It also comes much earlier in the year, when it can do even more damage to our candidates.

And with recent reports showing Democrats' lead over Republicans in the generic ballot shrinking, we have to take this threat seriously if we want to flip the House in November.

Momentum is on our side: Many Democratic challengers -- including our endorsed women -- are outraising the Republicans they're challenging.

That means Republicans are going to work overtime to protect their seats and keep us from flipping the House -- so we have to work even harder.

**Donate $3 to make sure pro-choice Democratic women have the resources they need to flip the House:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Fight-GOP-Big-Money](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5b15/24c69fd9/1bc07f195/188efed7/3225591/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180521_email_Adelson?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgFightGOPBigMoney&utm_campaign=WQEFEQ46N_digital_email_20180521_Adelson_inact&source=WQEFEQ46N_digital_email_20180521_Adelson_inact")**

Thanks,

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: I would actively use the powers of the office to protect the people of our state and country from Donald Trump and his administration.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
Donald Trump and his team are without a doubt the most corrupt group of people to ever occupy the White House.
#
Peter -
A few nights ago, I went on MSNBC to talk about the way I view the role of New York's next Attorney General at this moment in our history.
At the top of that list: fight against the lawlessness, unconstitutional behavior, and corruption of the Trump administration.
So I want to be clear with you: If I were to run and become New York's next Attorney General, I would actively use the powers of the office to protect the people of our state and country from Donald Trump and his administration.
Yes, Donald Trump and his team are without a doubt the most corrupt group of people to ever occupy the White House. And we will take on that corruption.
But the next AG must also be prepared to fight the impact his administration's policies have on our communities. That means suing Scott Pruitt and the EPA when they threaten our environment, fighting the FCC's rollback of net neutrality, and protecting vulnerable populations targeted by Jeff Sessions' DOJ.
I'm prepared to take on all of them, and if I run, I plan to win.
But make no mistake, if that happens we'll be up against a political and financial elite who don't want me within a mile of the AG's office, and they'll do whatever it takes to stop us. But the truth is, they won't stand a chance if we're in this together. That's what it will take. All of us. Together:
**[Can I count on you to make a $3 donation to our exploratory committee today? I can't do this alone. The only path forward is all of us. Together.](https://zephyr.bsd.net/page/m/4d780fcc/6e822e2f/18c0efc4/4172196a/2732582474/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA1MjEtYSJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-pardons?refcode=em180521-a")**
I also want to make one more thing clear, since it has been in the news a lot lately.
Donald Trump's capacity to pardon does not include state crimes. So if and when he hands out pardons to his cronies, we must use every option we have to prosecute them under state law.
I strongly support a bill pending in the New York legislature that would ensure that state double jeopardy laws would not inhibit such prosecutions.
That is not just within the Attorney General's power, but in my view, it is her responsibility. No matter who is breaking the law, it is the AG's duty to root out corruption and seek justice for the people.
Thanks for being a part of this. Because I cannot do it alone.
Best,
Zephyr

Greetings!

We hope all Prince George's County mothers had a wonderful Mother's Day. We honor the sacrifices all mothers in our community makes for their children, and wish to extend the love and support they've given their families right back to them. A former working mom, Donna believes no mother should have to choose between going to work and taking care of a sick child. That's why she supports policies that lift up working mothers, such as paid sick leave and universal child care.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: One simple fact on prescription drugs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | If one thing is true about prescription drug prices, it's this: **They're getting out of control.** Ohioans suffering from chronic illnesses count on prescriptions. But prescription drug pricing doesn't work like the price of other items. If coffee is too expensive for you, you can choose not to buy it. That's not an option you have with chemotherapy medication, insulin, or other life-saving medications. Here's another fact about prescription drug prices: **Congress can take action now to bring them down.** We can require transparency when drug companies plan to hike the prices of their life-saving medications and penalize gouging. We can also allow Medicare to negotiate prescription drug prices, which would have a ripple effect through the market to bring overall costs down. We have a path forward. All we're missing is Congressional leaders' willingness to take this path. **I need you on my side to demand Congress and President Trump act.** [**_Urge Congress and Trump to take action immediately to bring down prescription drug costs._**](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffaab/4462dc26/5d8bddb4/2007e21d/1133768440/VEsH/ "http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/e180521m") Too many drug companies are focused on profits over patients. Thank you for helping me pressure Congress to turn this around. Sherrod

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: I am running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
In the coming weeks I will have more information to share. But today, I wanted to let you know that it was my intention to run...
#
Friends -
I have some important news to share, and I wanted you to hear it first and directly from me:
**Today, as Vermont's senator, I am announcing my intention to run for re-election to the United States Senate in 2018.**
The truth is these are painful, frightening and unprecedented times.
We have seen a right-wing extremist, Republican Congress attempt to throw up to 32 million Americans off of the health care they have, give a trillion dollars in tax breaks to the richest people in our country and the largest corporations, destroy environmental legislation, work aggressively to deny women the right to control their own bodies and end net neutrality.
We have a president who is not only a pathological liar but someone who is trying to win votes by dividing our nation up based on the color of our skin, our country of origin, our religion, our gender or our sexual orientation. Further, and dangerously, he is undermining our democratic institutions as he attempts to move us toward an authoritarian type society.
If re-elected, you can be sure that I will continue to be the fiercest opponent in the Senate to the right-wing extremism of Trump and the Republican leadership.
But being anti-Trump and anti-Republican is not enough. We need to continue our fight for a progressive agenda which will take on oligarchy and improve the lives of working people throughout our country. We need to keep pushing for Medicare for all, a $15/hour living wage, free college tuition at public colleges and universities and the reduction of student debt, rebuilding our crumbling infrastructure, fighting climate change and promoting racial, social and environmental justice.
It is my intention to run a strong grassroots campaign throughout Vermont, and I look forward to your support. In the coming weeks, I will have additional information about when and where we're going to kick-off this campaign in Vermont and how you can help.
But today, I wanted to let you know that it was my intention to run again for the Senate and to ask if you could help us reach some modest fundraising goals we need to fund this grassroots campaign.
**[Please make a $3 donation to my re-election campaign today. We have some modest fundraising goals to hit in order to fund this effort, so your donation will go a long way toward ensuring we win in November.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie_reelect?refcode=em180521-t1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie_reelect?refcode=em180521-t1-full")**
The truth is, whether it is intensifying our fight against Trumpism or increasing our efforts to spread our progressive vision in every corner of the land, no one person can do that alone. We're in this together. The progress that we've been making over the last several years is because people from all communities and of all backgrounds have made their voices heard and are prepared to stand up and fight back.
That is the political revolution -- and it continues.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
******[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie_reelect?refcode=em180521-t1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie_reelect?refcode=em180521-t1-full")******
**** ****

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). Hello,

It's been almost a week since the primary, and every new data point I've heard -- from the impressive Democratic turnout to the record number of Pennsylvania women running for Congress -- has given me incredible hope for what we can do this year. We have a real opportunity to take back Congress, but that won't happen if we don't give these races everything we have in the coming months.

Special interests have made it clear that they'll do everything they can to drown out the voices of regular folks in this year's race. They're already spending millions on ads across the country, and we're still six months away from the election. Congressman Lou Barletta, my opponent, has even said that "there is going to be a flood of outside money in this race," so we need to take this threat seriously.

**[I'm going to stand up to these special interests and shady donors because it's the right thing to do. But the truth is that campaigns cost money, so I need supporters like you to help me fight back by chipping in $5 or whatever you can now.](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e67fa/51dbcc2a/47ff47/3a2abd9/4166709090/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/051718maymidmonth?gpsid=11_63_645&refcode=em18_180521_midmo2_fnd_gq_ndn__BC&utm_campaign=em18_180521_midmo2_fnd_gq_ndn__BC&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bcase&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&utm_content=2+-+Im+going+to+stand+up+to+these+special+in")**

I don't support legislation based on who proposed it or what special interests support it -- I vote based on what's in the best interests of the Pennsylvanians I represent. It's that simple. But Congressman Barletta votes with President Trump 99% of the time, even when those votes have had dire consequences for middle-class families here in Pennsylvania.

We can protect Pennsylvania families and fight back against the special interests who want to drown out our voices, but we need your help to do it.

**Please, if it's possible for you, chip in $5 or more right now.**

Here's the best link: **[secure.bobcasey.com/donate](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e67fa/51dbcc2a/47ff47/3a2abda/4166709090/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/051718maymidmonth?gpsid=11_63_645&refcode=em18_180521_midmo2_fnd_gq_ndn__BC&utm_campaign=em18_180521_midmo2_fnd_gq_ndn__BC&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bcase&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&utm_content=3+-+securebobcaseycomdonate")**

Bob

Friend,
Republicans are trying to use the **2020 Census** to strip power from minority and immigrant communities. [**Will you help us stop them? Please make a quick donation of $5 or more if you can.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ugB2L6eE7kHPHNSbxSnjDBoru8UCqf5KhPggs9n8jlo=/akoxZ2xV6e_dNMxCePZ2cu3L64RdspzzehEYAeWGfKQ=?refcode=May-21-RS-2020-Census&amount=5.00)

**This is unacceptable and unconstitutional.** We cannot allow Republicans to use the 2020 Census to defund neighborhoods and scare immigrant populations for their political advantage.
**Over 130 government programs rely on this information to allocate hundreds of billions of dollars to lower income families, the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP), Pell Grants for college, school lunch programs, highway spending, and more.**
Please contribute here so we can protect immigrant communities and surrounding counties from being starved of funding: [**As little as $5 can help us get ready and be successful in the months ahead.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ugB2L6eE7kHPHNSbxSnjDBoru8UCqf5KhPggs9n8jlo=/akoxZ2xV6e_dNMxCePZ2cu3L64RdspzzehEYAeWGfKQ=?refcode=May-21-RS-2020-Census&amount=5.00)

subject: we can do better than Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRYAN CAFORIO FOR CONGRESS
body:

| | Peter,

Thank you so much for joining our campaign.

I am running to give the people of California's 25th District a voice, to harness the unprecedented level of energy we have been witnessing, and to move our country in a direction that aligns with _**our**_ values--not Donald Trump's values.

I promise to be a champion for well-paying jobs, Medicare for All, quality schools, and clean air and water.

**Please take a moment to like and share us on Facebook and follow us on Twitter.**

**[Like us on Facebook](https://secure.bryancaforio.com/page/m/1d38438d/169f49de/342102f4/33866016/1189712131/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/BryanCaforio/?refcode=INTRO2")**
**[Follow @BryanCaforio](https://secure.bryancaforio.com/page/m/1d38438d/169f49de/342102f4/33866015/1189712131/VEsF/ "https://twitter.com/BryanCaforio?refcode=INTRO2")**
My parents were both public school teachers, and I saw firsthand the difference a good teacher can make in giving kids an opportunity to succeed. Everything I have, and everything I am, is due to the fact that I went to good public schools and was given the opportunity to get ahead.

Unfortunately, because of misguided policies coming out of Congress today, too many people don't get that same opportunity.

We can do better. The American dream is founded on everyone having the opportunity to succeed. With your help, we can keep that promise alive.

Thank you so much for your support.

\- Bryan |
---
The son of two public school teachers, **Bryan Caforio is a Yale Law School graduate and former federal law clerk who will use his skills and experience to hold Trump accountable.** Bryan will fight to pass Medicare for All, protect our environment, and defend Dreamers. He's the progressive candidate who's been endorsed by dozens of local officials, labor unions, and the majority of delegates at the California Democratic Party Convention.

We're running a grassroots campaign that relies on getting the message out to supporters like you. If you're fired up and ready to flip our district, you can contribute by clicking [here.](https://secure.bryancaforio. **[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Run-To-Win-NoVA](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5bfb/24c69fd9/1bca8e085/188ee456/9284644/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20180413_email_RunToWinNOVA?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgRunToWinNoVA&utm_campaign=WQENEQ51_digital_email_20180521_RtWNoVATrainingTestKicker_Text&source=WQENEQ51_digital_email_20180521_RtWNoVATrainingTestKicker_Text")**

Peter,

Run to Win is coming to NoVA!

In just a few weeks, my team and I will be in Virginia to train women about the basics of running for office. And we want you to join us!

Run to Win 101 is a free, half-day introductory training for women thinking about running for office.

You don't need to be a declared candidate or even actively planning to run to attend. You just have to have an interest in learning the basics of being a candidate for state or local office.

**[Apply to attend our Run to Win 101 training in NoVA on Sunday, June 24th.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5bfb/24c69fd9/1bca8e085/188ee457/9284644/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20180413_email_RunToWinNOVA?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+Apply+to+attend+our+Run+to+Win+101+train&utm_campaign=WQENEQ51_digital_email_20180521_RtWNoVATrainingTestKicker_Text&source=WQENEQ51_digital_email_20180521_RtWNoVATrainingTestKicker_Text")**
**WHAT:**
Run to Win 101
A free, half-day training for pro-choice Democratic women thinking about running for elected office

**WHEN:**
Sunday, June 24th, 2018
9:00 a.m. -- 2:00 p.m.

**WHERE:**
Herndon, VA
[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5bfb/24c69fd9/1bca8e085/188ee450/9284644/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20180413_email_RunToWinNOVA?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQENEQ51_digital_email_20180521_RtWNoVATrainingTestKicker_Text&source=WQENEQ51_digital_email_20180521_RtWNoVATrainingTestKicker_Text")

Space is limited and seats are being offered on a first-come, first-served basis.

**Submit your application to attend Run to Win 101:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Run-To-Win-NoVA](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5bfb/24c69fd9/1bca8e085/188ee451/9284644/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20180413_email_RunToWinNOVA?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgRunToWinNoVA&utm_campaign=WQENEQ51_digital_email_20180521_RtWNoVATrainingTestKicker_Text&source=WQENEQ51_digital_email_20180521_RtWNoVATrainingTestKicker_Text")**

Mũthoni Wambu Kraal

Hey there,

It's been five days since President Trump went all-in on this race, praising the Republican nominee and attacking Bob on Twitter. Since the primary, the Washington Times wrote that "Republicans and the White House view the Senate contest between Mr. Barletta and Mr. Casey as one of their best opportunities to flip a seat" and Congressman Barletta himself promised that "there is going to be a flood of outside money in this race."

[**_Long story short, this race is getting expensive fast, and we can 't afford to fall behind: can you chip in $5 to support Bob?_**](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6700/51dbcc2a/440b86/3a2a96d/65531198/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYm9iLWNhc2V5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbV8yMDE4MDUyMV9mcjJfbmRfZjFzMiIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180521_fr2_nd_f1s2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

Subject: President Trump is tweeting about me (again). Here's what I need you to do:

President Trump is tweeting about me again, and you know what that means.

We've been in the general election season for less than 24 hours, and the President has already tweeted _three times_ about our race. He's praising Congressman Lou Barletta, who won the Republican primary to challenge me last night, and attacking my record, too.

**[It's never been more important to get our message out there and set the record straight: can you chip in $5 or whatever you can right now?](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6700/51dbcc2a/440b86/3a2a96d/65531198/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYm9iLWNhc2V5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbV8yMDE4MDUyMV9mcjJfbmRfZjFzMiIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180521_fr2_nd_f1s2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

The President can attack me all he wants, but here's the truth: I'm not in the Senate to genuflect to him, I'm here to do right by Pennsylvania. If the President has an idea that would help Pennsylvanians get ahead, I'll support it. But when his plans would destroy their health, their finances or their retirement, I'll always fight back, two fists up. It's that simple.

But we can't underestimate the President, not when it comes to attracting Republican special interests and dark money to Senate races. The President and Congressman Barletta are close friends, and based on how the President has reacted to this primary win, I have a feeling he's going to continue to be heavily involved in this race. He won Pennsylvania in 2016 and we have to take his involvement seriously.

**I am confident that when Pennsylvania voters hear the truth about the work I 've done for the Commonwealth, they'll send me back to the Senate. But cutting through the noise and falsehoods that the President and his wealthy allies can bring to this race will be expensive. Can you rush a $5 donation to help out today?**

Bob

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Giving our teachers a raise
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3083/9e00690/471eefe3/24020ec9/617001386/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180521_MJTeac_acq_gq_act__AG&source=em18_180521_MJTeac_acq_gq_act__AG")
Friends,

Our public schools are chronically underfunded and our teachers are chronically underpaid. Last year, our state ranked 47th in average instructional staff pay. Teachers are struggling to make ends meet, and our kids and their education are suffering.

That's why today I've proposed a bold new plan to legalize and tax recreational marijuana -- so we can invest new revenue into giving our teachers and instructional staff the raise they deserve. We're going to make sure every teacher and support staff member earns at least the national average, reward our veteran teachers for their years of service, and set a $50,000 minimum salary for new teachers.

A majority of Floridians support it, and states across the country are modernizing their criminal justice systems by legalizing as well. **[It's time Florida joins them, and I'm proud that our campaign was the first to call for legalization. Sign here to become a citizen co-sponsor of our plan.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3083/9e00690/471eefe3/24020ec8/617001386/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/legalize-invest-in-teachers?gpsid=13_55_670&source=em18_180521_MJTeac_acq_gq_act__AG&utm_campaign=em18_180521_MJTeac_acq_gq_act__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&firstname=&lastname=&zip=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=2+-+Itrsquos+time+Florida+joins+them+and+Irs")**

---

Back in January, I called for our state to finally legalize marijuana and put the new revenue towards our public schools. Today, we're declaring that this new revenue should be used to help lift up our teachers and support staff, and let them focus on shaping and molding young minds.

Florida's students and teachers have been shortchanged for decades, and in recent years they've been under direct attack thanks to Governor Rick Scott. But by legalizing marijuana, we have the opportunity to bring new revenue to our schools and help give our children the futures they deserve.

**[We have the opportunity move our state up from 29th in the nation on education quality to #1 -- add your name and become a citizen co-sponsor of my new plan now.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3083/9e00690/471eefe3/24020ecd/617001386/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/legalize-invest-in-teachers?gpsid=13_55_670&source=em18_180521_MJTeac_acq_gq_act__AG&utm_campaign=em18_180521_MJTeac_acq_gq_act__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&firstname=&lastname=&zip=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=5+-+We+have+the+opportunity+move+our+state+u")**

Thank you,

Andrew

clean_body: "" Friends, Our public schools are chronically underfunded and our teachers are chronically underpaid. Last year, our state ranked 47th in average instructional staff pay. Teachers are struggling to make ends meet, and our kids and their education are suffering. That's why today I've proposed a bold new plan to legalize and tax recreational marijuana -- so we can invest new revenue into giving our teachers and instructional staff the raise they deserve. We're going to make sure every teacher and support staff member earns at least the national average, reward our veteran teachers for their years of service, and set a $50,000 minimum salary for new teachers. A majority of Floridians support it, and states across the country are modernizing their criminal justice systems by legalizing as well. "" "" "" Back in January, I called for our state to finally legalize marijuana and put the new revenue towards our public schools. Today, we're declaring that this new revenue should be used to help lift up our teachers and support staff, and let them focus on shaping and molding young minds. Florida's students and teachers have been shortchanged for decades, and in recent years they've been under direct attack thanks to Governor Rick Scott. But by legalizing marijuana, we have the opportunity to bring new revenue to our schools and help give our children the futures they deserve. "" Thank you, Andrew "" Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor. Andrew Gillum for Governor 1550 Melvin Street, Tallahassee, FL 32303

name: Jay Inslee
subject: FWD: Save the open internet.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
We won in the Senate -- add your name to demand a vote in the House! | [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd797e9/2f5ea88d/7161f904/2cbccf58/1872792352/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/demand-a-vote?utm_source=ema_2018-05-21_nn-kicker&source=ema_2018-05-21_nn-kicker&utm_campaign=nn-kicker&utm_medium=ema") It's all thanks to you, friend. Because of your calls, protests, and petitions, the Senate last week finally listened. Not only did they pass legislation to protect net neutrality -- they did it with senators on both sides of the aisle. It's a bipartisan affirmation of what we in Washington state already know: A free, open internet is essential to free speech, independent media, and small business. So first of all -- thank you for taking action. You deserve a moment to celebrate. And now, let us get back to work. The House leadership has indicated that they won't even let net neutrality come to the floor for a vote. But if we keep the pressure on, we can make sure every representative knows that if they don't force a vote on net neutrality, we will remember it in the midterms. [**Sign on right now to demand that the House hold a vote on net neutrality. We are so close to reinstating national protections for the internet -- we can't give up now.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd797e9/2f5ea88d/7161f904/2cbccf58/1872792352/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/demand-a-vote?utm_source=ema_2018-05-21_nn-kicker&source=ema_2018-05-21_nn-kicker&utm_campaign=nn-kicker&utm_medium=ema") Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd797e9/2f5ea88d/7161f904/2cbccf58/1872792352/VEsF/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/demand-a-vote?utm_source=ema_2018-05-21_nn-kicker&source=ema_2018-05-21_nn-kicker&utm_campaign=nn-kicker&utm_medium=ema")
---
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Jay Inslee
Date: Thursday, May 10, 2018
Subject: Save the open internet
Friend,
We are so close.
Yesterday, a group of 50 pro-internet senators in D.C. moved to force a vote in the next week to save net neutrality. 50 senators -- which means we're one vote away from protecting a free and open internet in the Senate.
We don't want two worlds: one for people who can afford fast internet, one for all of those who will be stuck in the slow lane. One for big companies who can pay for premium channels, one for all the independent media and small businesses who can't compete.
That's why we're leading in the states. With the leadership of governors and state legislatures, states like Washington are taking action and passing net neutrality for our residents. Together, we're showing what leadership to demand a free and open internet looks like, but the work isn't done.
**It goes without saying, the internet crosses state lines. We need a national solution for what should be a right for all of us: a free and open internet.**
**The FCC made a terrible decision in December to end net neutrality. We have a chance to put it back on the books.[And that's where you come in: can you add your name to our petition for Congress to show how important net neutrality is to us?](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd797e9/2f5ea88d/7161f904/2cbccf58/1872792352/VEsC/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/demand-a-vote?utm_source=ema_2018-05-21_nn-kicker&source=ema_2018-05-21_nn-kicker&utm_campaign=nn-kicker&utm_medium=ema")**
The Senate is demanding a vote within the next week on a Congressional Review Act, which has the power to nullify or restore regulations affected by federal government agencies like the FCC. Going through Congress is our last chance to pass a law that will save net neutrality nationwide.
Under my leadership, Washington was the first state to pass net neutrality protections this year. We've made good progress here at home, but Washington businesses will still be affected if federal law permits an internet service provider free-for-all with the rest of the country.
[**So take a minute out of your day to save the open internet. Add your name now to tell Congress to vote for net neutrality.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd797e9/2f5ea88d/7161f904/2cbccf58/1872792352/VEsD/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/demand-a-vote?utm_source=ema_2018-05-21_nn-kicker&source=ema_2018-05-21_nn-kicker&utm_campaign=nn-kicker&utm_medium=ema")
This is our last chance. We've got to act now.
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[ADD YOUR NAME »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd797e9/2f5ea88d/7161f904/2cbccf58/1872792352/VEsA/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/demand-a-vote?utm_source=ema_2018-05-21_nn-kicker&source=ema_2018-05-21_nn-kicker&utm_campaign=nn-kicker&utm_medium=ema")
